---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a scoped improvement for CareerBoost AI
title: "feat: "
labels: ["type: feature", "status: needs triage"]
---

## Problem

Describe the user problem this feature solves.

## Proposed Solution

Describe the desired behavior and how it fits the approved CareerBoost AI scope.

## Target User

Identify which user persona benefits from this change.

## User Outcome

Explain what the user can do after this feature exists.

## Scope

Describe what is included.

## Non-Goals

Describe what should remain out of scope.

## Acceptance Criteria

List the measurable conditions that must be true before this feature is
considered complete.

## Product and Architecture Alignment

Explain how this proposal aligns with the Product Requirements Document and
System Architecture Document.
